# amabot

> amabot is a free Amazon monitoring and auto-buy assistant focused on Pokémon and high-demand product drops. It continuously watches product availability and pricing and can either send alerts or automatically place orders when your buying rules match.

amabot runs locally on the user's computer with a separate Amazon browser session. It supports Monitor-Only alerts, Auto-buy with custom rules, seller and price filters, and a live activity dashboard. Community support is available on Discord and Telegram.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, how it works, community, and FAQ.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of amabot.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How amabot handles data.
- [Affiliate Disclosure](/affiliate-disclosure): Amazon Associates disclosure.
